lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.20]Be kind, be kind, that's Myrtle's way!
[00:04.84]Be kind, be kind, every day!
[00:09.40]Slow and steady, never rude,
[00:13.84]Kindness is the attitude!
[00:17.92]Be kind, be kind, that's Myrtle's way!
[00:22.30]Be kind, be kind, every day!
[00:26.94]Pass it on and pass it round,
[00:31.30]Kindness makes the world go round!
[00:38.58]Be kind, be kind, that's Myrtle's way!
[00:39.36]Be kind, be kind, every day!
